title: Not another copilot.
subtitle: A tutor that learns from you.

pillars.label: Adaptive learning
pillars.title: Calibrated to you, not the average.
pillars.description: DevSenses tunes depth, tone, and quiz to your actual level — and skips topics you've already mastered.

items.title: 5 depths
items.description: From 'for a 10-year-old' to 'algorithmic trade-offs'. Slider, instant switch.

items.title: 5 tutor personas
items.description: Friendly mentor, pragmatic, sarcastic, academic, or default.

items.title: Adaptive quiz
items.description: Per-concept mastery. Right 5 times in a row? Skipped.

items.title: Socratic mode
items.description: AI asks before answering. Forces you to think.

pillars.label: Power tools over the diff
pillars.title: Everything you need, without leaving the screen.
pillars.description: Surgical shortcuts to understand any snippet — explanation, complexity, alternatives, hidden bugs.

items.title: ⌘K Cheat sheet
items.description: Select any code. Syntax, gotchas, examples.

items.title: Auto Big-O detection
items.description: Nested loops, find-in-loop, unmemoized recursion. Flagged.

items.title: What if?
items.description: Compare current vs alternative approach. Trade-off table.

items.title: Bug hunt
items.description: AI injects subtle bug. You train code review.

items.title: Personal glossary
items.description: Clickable terms in markdown. Definitions cached forever.

pillars.label: No catch
pillars.title: Your key. Your disk. Your pace.
pillars.description: Runs local, with the AI you already pay for. No subscription, no cloud, no vendor lock.

items.title: 5 AIs in one app
items.description: Claude · Codex · Gemini · Aider · Ollama. BYOK.

items.title: 100% local
items.description: Diff never leaves your device. No subscription, no telemetry.

items.title: Open source · MIT
items.description: Open code. No vendor lock. Fork it if you want.
